overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a moonlit meadow with wildflowers, crossing a wooden footbridge over a stream, and passing a rustic log cabin in a forested rural area. The scene features cool blue-green nighttime lighting with clear visibility.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through tall grass and wildflowers in the moonlit meadow

entered.detail: grassy field with white and purple wildflowers covering the ground
tall evergreen trees forming the forest boundary in the distance
narrow trail winding through the tall grass

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through an open meadow at night, surrounded by tall grass and wildflowers. The path winds through the center of the field with pine trees visible in the distant background under a dark blue sky.

events.description: ground surface transitions from grassy meadow to rocky dirt path as trees close in

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding dirt path toward the stream crossing

entered.detail: uneven ground with exposed rocks and gravel along the path
narrow waterway running parallel to the path, becoming visible through the trees

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions from open meadow to a more enclosed forest trail with rocky terrain. The path becomes uneven with visible stones, and a stream becomes audible and visible to the right as the trees close in overhead.

events.description: character steps onto wooden bridge to cross the stream
character exits bridge onto dirt path on the opposite bank

agents.ego_description: carefully walking across the wooden planks of the footbridge over the water

entered.detail: rustic wooden footbridge with railings spanning the stream

segments.scene_description: Geralt crosses a narrow wooden bridge over the stream, the planks creaking underfoot. The bridge spans the waterway with simple wooden railings, and the surrounding vegetation is sparser near the water's edge.

events.description: rustic log cabin with warm lit window comes into view on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking past the wooden cabin, observing the warm light glowing from the window

entered.detail: small rustic wooden cabin with horizontal logs and a warm orange light in the window
low stone wall running alongside the path near the cabin

segments.scene_description: After crossing the bridge, the path leads past a cozy log cabin with a warm light glowing from its window, contrasting with the cool moonlight. A low stone wall runs alongside the path as the forest opens slightly to reveal this rural dwelling.

events.description: passing the log cabin, continuing deeper into the forest along the winding path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dirt path away from the cabin into the darker forested area

segments.scene_description: The path continues winding through the forest, leaving the cabin behind. The stone wall persists along the right side of the trail as the trees close in again, creating a more enclosed feeling in the moonlit woods.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a moonlit wilderness that shifts from an open meadow into a dense, forested rural landscape. It begins with Geralt walking through a wide field of tall grass and wildflowers under a dark blue sky, before the terrain gradually tightens into an enclosed forest trail marked by rocky ground. As the trees close in overhead, the camera follows him across a narrow wooden bridge spanning a stream, where the vegetation thins near the water's edge. The scene then opens slightly to reveal a cozy log cabin with a warm glow emanating from its window, contrasting with the cool moonlight as the path skirts along a low stone wall. Finally, the camera continues winding deeper into the woods, leaving the dwelling behind as the forest canopy closes in once more.
